title: A to Z 32000 Magnetic Drawing Board Set for 3 years to 8 years, Large, White
features: COMPLETE SET: Includes 1 large magnetic drawing board, 1 small portable drawing board, and 2 magnetic stampers for creative play
REUSABLE DESIGN: Draw, stamp, and erase repeatedly without waste - perfect for endless hours of artistic exploration
EDUCATIONAL VALUE: Helps develop fine motor skills, creativity, and artistic expression through magnetic drawing activities
PORTABLE FUN: Lightweight construction with convenient carrying handle makes it ideal for travel and on-the-go entertainment
DUAL BOARDS: Large board for detailed drawings and small board for quick sketches, offering versatile drawing options
description: Product Description Unleash your child's creativity with this delightful magnetic drawing board set from Art & Craft. The set includes both a large and small drawing board, perfect for artistic expression wherever you go. Each board features a smooth drawing surface that can be easily erased, allowing for endless hours of creative play. The set comes with two magnetic stampers to add fun shapes and patterns to drawings. The sturdy construction and convenient carrying handle on the large board make it ideal for both home use and travel. Children can practice their drawing skills, learn numbers, or simply let their imagination run wild. The boards' magnetic design means no mess, no paper waste, and no lost crayons or markers. Whether it's doodling, practising letters, or creating imaginative scenes, this versatile drawing set provides a perfect platform for artistic development and educational play. The bright yellow and red colour scheme adds a cheerful touch that appeals to young artists. Safety Warning No applicable warnings
